key_insight: The paper proposes an intelligent control strategy that combines soft-voting ensemble learning with PSO-optimized fuzzy control to reduce laser welding deviation in skin-frame structures.
engineering_relevance: This is relevant for improving alignment accuracy, process stability, and quality consistency in precision laser welding for aerospace and other thin-walled assembled structures.
method: Soft-voting ensemble learning for deviation prediction/regulation
Particle swarm optimization (PSO) to tune fuzzy controller parameters
Closed-loop intelligent regulation of laser welding deviation
evidence_signal: The abstract indicates a journal-article study in Optics & Laser Technology, but it does not provide dataset size, metrics, or comparative performance details.
watch_item: Implementation may depend on representative training data and robust sensor feedback, so performance could degrade if the welding conditions differ from those used to optimize the controller.
paper_title: Intelligent regulation of laser welding deviation for skin-frame structures based on soft voting ensemble learning and PSO-optimized fuzzy control
